node.title: Tips and Recent Uber Internship OA Questions

article.title: Tips and Recent Uber Internship OA Questions
article.content:
Hi everyone! I’m preparing for Uber’s SWE/SDE internship Online Assessment. I’d appreciate any tips or advice on how best to structure my prep, as well as what topics (DSA patterns, system/OOP problems, real-world scenarios, etc.) are essential to focus on to clear the OA.

If you have recently given the Uber OA, I’d love to hear about the types of coding questions asked(without violating NDA), favorite resources for practice, and any specific company quirks/patterns you noticed during your prep.

Also, any guidance on time management during the assessment, strategy for tackling hard/medium-level questions, or mock practice recommendations would be super helpful!

Please tag or link any relevant posts/resources from LeetCode Discuss for Uber OA, and share your experiences.
Thanks in advance for helping out a fellow candidate!

post.content: ig, we all have the OAs on 6th oct, 6 pm lol
yess, same here please provide with any help you could with uber\'s question pattern

I\'m not sure if you\'ll have a design round for internship, although it\'s better to be prepped. That\'s what I see missing in your strategy. Try  [Mockingly](https://mockingly.ai) as they have company specific questions and also domain specific. Might be helpful for your case.
